source_pr.title: planner: fix the unstable unit test TestTableFromMeta
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #25691 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: planner: fix the unstable unit test TestTableFromMeta

### What is changed and how it works?
`TestTableFromMeta` modifies some read-only meta table info, which is incorrect and might be conflicted with the background auto-analyze.

This PR makes it clone meta table info before modifying it.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- `No release note`
